title: Quest 35269 1.5 Litre Slow Cooker/Compact Stainless Steel / 3 Temperature Settings/Transparent Toughened Glass Lid/Dishwasher Safe Bowl/Black Colour / 120W
features: COMPACT SLOW COOKER – Cook delicious meals for yourself and 1-2 others with this 1.5 litre capacity slow cooker. Using only 120W of power, it makes cooking hassle-free while efficiently saving energy costs for every meal. The cooker’s exterior features cool touch handles and non-slip feet on the base.

REMOVABLE POT & LID – Cooking can be monitored thanks to the toughened, transparent glass lid, and the ceramic cooking pot can also be safely removed once the food inside is ready to eat. This allows you to bring the pot to a table, making serving convenient.

3 TEMPERATURE SETTINGS – Customise your cooking experience using 3 different temperature settings; the ‘high’ setting cooks food for 6-8 hours, the ‘low’ setting cooks for 2-4 hours, and the ‘keep warm’ temperature simply keeps food hot after cooking until it’s ready to eat later on.

EASY CLEAN – The removable pot carries an additional benefit in that it is dishwasher safe, and therefore very easy to clean. Alternatively, the pot can be emptied out, washed, and dried before it is ready to use again. The exterior of the slow cooker can also simply be wiped clean.

QUEST APPLIANCES - Quest are the leading manufacturer of cooking appliances ideal for giving you a helping hand in the kitchen. From omelette makers & waffle makers to teppanyaki grills & air fryers, visit the Quest store on Amazon to view the whole range.
description: Product Description Perfect for 1-2 People Quest 1.5 Litre Slow Cooker Cook delicious meals while saving energy using this 1.5L Slow Cooker from Quest. Its capacity makes it ideal for cooking personal meals, or for couples, requiring only 120W of power. Food can be cooked for up to 8 hours on the high setting, and you can also set the appliance to just keep its contents warm, allowing you to enjoy fresh food later on. Previous page 3 Temperature Settings Choose between a low power cooking setting, a high power cooking setting, and a keep warm setting. Removable Inner Pot The inner pot can be easily and safely removed, making it easy to serve freshly cooked food. Toughed Glass Lid The transparent lid, made from toughened glass, allows you to safely view the food while cooking. Dishwasher Safe Bowl The bowl can be easily cleaned in a dishwasher after being removed from the cooker, saving you time. Safe & Stable The machine's cool touch handles help to ensure safe use, and its non-slip feet keep it in place.
